headline: Oil Stocks Are Gushing. This Energy IPO Could Pop.

headline: Strong Backlog and Natural Gas Tailwinds Support Archrock's Growth
summary: AROC's strong 2026 backlog and rising U.S. natural gas demand from LNG and data centers are set to support steady growth and revenue visibility.

headline: Baker Hughes Taps Google Cloud As AI Power Demand Reshapes Growth
summary: Baker Hughes and Google Cloud have announced a new collaboration to roll out AI powered energy optimization solutions for data centers worldwide. The company has also secured multiple new energy infrastructure contracts tied to rising AI linked power demand and LNG developments. The news comes with Baker Hughes, NasdaqGS:BKR, trading at $63.49 after an 11.4% return over the past week and 34.7% return year to date. Baker Hughes, NasdaqGS:BKR, is increasingly positioning itself as more than a...

headline: XGS inks partnership to advance Meta’s New Mexico geothermal plant
summary: The deal links Baker Hughes’ geothermal experience with XGS’ technology to develop a 150-MW geothermal system for the social media company.

headline: XGS Energy and Baker Hughes Announce Strategic Collaboration to Advance Geothermal Development in New Mexico
summary: HOUSTON, March 25, 2026--XGS and Baker Hughes announce a strategic collaboration and initial order for engineering services to advance XGS's 150-MW geothermal project.
